file_name: Questionnaire – Coles - supermarket and liquor site in Kalgoorlie, WA - 28.11.2025.pdf

questions.text: Outline any concerns regarding the impact of the Acquisition on competition.
Provide any additional information or comments that you consider relevant to the ACCC’s assessment of the Acquisition.
Provide a brief description of your business or organisation, including any commercial relationships with Coles and/or M Holdings 4 Pty Ltd (the lessor).
